2.title: CPU usage %
2.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

3.title: CPU user
3.query:
timeseries user = avg(dt.host.cpu.user, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(user) desc
| limit 10
